title: Chapter 104
content:
Chapter 104

Playing both sides came with a risk of its own. What if they were to directly meet? Would that not expose me and the whole play?

Considering everything, that was the only thing that made me feel calm. They were never going to meet, I knew that. They would risk too much. They would maintain control of all proceedings through me in order to use me as a scapegoat in the event of any unforeseen circumstances. So, I was taking all the risks in this game.
